name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
🆕Boston Large 25cm✨
🔥This Dio.r Groove 25 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from beige calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio.r's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is adorned with a Christian Dio.r Paris logo and embellished with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The bag can be opened with a zipper lock using the included key charm. The spacious compartment has a slip pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8810
Size: 25 x 19 x 16 cm (L x H x W)
